name: What evidence do I need for chemical exposure workers comp case?
description: Safety sheets, photos, medical tests, witnesses, hygienist report[2][6].

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for chemical exposure workers comp case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Safety sheets, photos, medical tests, witnesses, hygienist report[2][6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Collect safety data sheets, labels, photos of site/chemicals, medical records, co-worker statements, and exposure tests.** Industrial hygienist inspection proves dose[2][6]. OSHA logs help[1]. **Key factors:** Link symptoms to specific chemicals via experts for causation[2]; timeline of events. **Practical guidance:** Report immediately, save contaminated items, request employer tests. Don't delay medical visits. **Strong evidence prevents denial.**
